recent_calls.summary: Denise called to inquire about replacing her water heater, which has stopped working but is not leaking or smelling gas. The agent documented her urgent request and confirmed her contact details and service address. The team will follow up with Denise by phone on the next business day to discuss options and pricing.
The call was initiated by the user but ended abruptly without any interaction or information exchange, as the agent requested the ZIP code for service address but received no response.

The user, Esmeralda Hernandez, called to report dissatisfaction with an AC tune-up service performed earlier that day, citing damage and incomplete work. The agent documented the complaint, collected contact details, and arranged for a follow-up service appointment as soon as possible. The user was also given instructions on how to send photos to support the claim.

The user called to follow up on a technician visit scheduled for the day. The agent informed the user that since it was after hours, they could not confirm or dispatch a technician immediately but assured the request would be prioritized the next business day. The agent then asked for the user's full name to pull up their details.
The call was very brief, with the agent introducing themselves and the user responding with a simple greeting before the call ended abruptly.
The call was very brief, with the agent greeting the user but no further conversation occurred before the user hung up.

Jose called to report an issue with a broken box that a technician was supposed to repair. He expressed concern about the condition of the box and requested a callback to resolve the problem. The agent acknowledged the call but the conversation ended without a resolution.

Herbert called to confirm and cancel any scheduled thermostat installation appointment at his Florissant address. The agent confirmed the cancellation request and assured Herbert that someone from the company would follow up to confirm. Herbert declined information about maintenance programs and feedback requests.

The user, Delores, returned a call but decided to call back later as she believed the previous call was just to verify her appointment. The agent offered to take information or questions but the user chose to hang up and call back the next day.
The call was very brief, with the agent greeting the user and offering assistance, but the user hung up immediately without responding.
The user called and attempted to speak to someone named Mister Hello, but the call was very brief and ended abruptly without a full conversation.

The user called to schedule a service appointment for a thermostat installation due to wiring color mismatches. The agent collected the user's details, confirmed the service address, and noted the preferred appointment time for the next day. The user requested information about maintenance programs to be included but was not ready to commit, and provided positive feedback about the call experience.

The user, Anthony Edmonds, called to clarify warranty coverage for a recently installed furnace, specifically regarding parts and labor for a blower issue. He has been without heat for two days and the agent documented the issue as urgent and assured a callback from a representative on the next business day. The call ended with the user understanding that a live agent was not available after hours but would follow up soon.
The call was very brief, with the agent greeting the user and asking how to assist, but the user hung up immediately without responding.

Isaiah from American Home Shield called to inquire if Budget can service a blower connected to the duct for a specific dispatch number. The virtual assistant documented the details and informed Isaiah that a representative will call back on the next business day to follow up. The call ended with no further questions from Isaiah.

The user called after hours to inquire if their heating and cooling technician would be returning to the service address. The agent collected the necessary details and informed the user that a team member would call back on the next business day. The user declined further assistance and ended the call.

The user, Deborah, called after hours trying to find out if someone was coming out for a service, but the agent explained that they could not confirm appointments after hours and offered to take details for a follow-up. The user did not provide clear information or request service, and the call ended without a specific resolution.
The user called to speak with a representative about getting a replacement installed. The agent attempted to assist but then transferred the call to a live agent for further help.
The user called Budget and was immediately transferred to a live representative as requested. The agent facilitated the transfer without any issues.

The user called to request a plumbing service appointment for an outdoor spigot that has no water, which was previously serviced by Budget. The agent confirmed the user's details, scheduled a preferred Saturday morning appointment, and collected feedback on the call experience. The user was satisfied with the quick and clear service and the call ended positively with a follow-up to confirm the appointment.

The user, Gina from the Missouri Department of Labor, called to speak with Shannon Gregory. The agent informed her that direct transfer was not possible but took a message and contact number for Shannon to follow up. The call ended with confirmation of the message and no further requests from the user.

The call was very brief and ended before the user provided any information or engaged with the agent. The agent attempted to start the conversation by asking for the service address ZIP code, but the user hung up immediately.
The user called and requested to speak with Seji. The agent attempted to connect the user and successfully transferred the call to the requested party.
The user called and requested to be connected to Nicole. The agent successfully transferred the call to the requested contact.
The call was very brief, with the agent greeting the user and asking how to assist, but the user hung up immediately without responding.
The user called but quickly realized they had the wrong number and ended the call without providing any information. The agent attempted to gather the service address ZIP code but was unsuccessful.
The user requested to speak with a live representative, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The call lasted 17 seconds and ended with a successful transfer.
The user requested to be connected to a live agent, and the agent successfully transferred the call to another agent.
The user called and was quickly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The initial agent, Sophie, acknowledged the request and completed the transfer successfully.
The user called to request a follow-up appointment and asked to speak with a live agent. The initial agent, Sophie, transferred the call to another agent to assist the user further.

John Fletcher called to schedule a service appointment for his air conditioning system, which is not responding to the thermostat and won't turn on. The agent confirmed the appointment for Monday, April 6th at 11 a.m. and collected the home warranty dispatch number. John provided feedback rating the AI assistant a 4 and suggested informing callers that they would be speaking with an AI before the call.

Alex from American Home Shield called to schedule a home warranty dispatch for a central air conditioning unit that is not cooling. The agent confirmed the details, corrected the customer's name and address, and noted the preferred service date as early as April 3rd. The call ended with the user declining maintenance program information and providing positive feedback on the service.
The call was very brief with the agent greeting the user and asking how to assist, but the user hung up immediately without responding.
The user requested to speak with someone, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.

Jett Kennedy called to request an update on the HVAC replacement quote for both heating and cooling systems. The agent confirmed details and noted that someone from Budget Heating, Cooling & Plumbing will follow up as soon as possible. Jett declined information about maintenance programs and feedback requests.

Frank D'Antonio called to transfer a claim from American Home Shield for a down draft issue with a Wolf exhaust fan. The agent collected all necessary details and scheduled a service appointment with a preference to speak with a technician before the visit. Frank declined information about maintenance programs and feedback requests.
The user requested to speak with a live person, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.

The user called to follow up on a missed callback regarding their AC tune-up. The agent apologized for the delay and transferred the call to someone who could provide live updates. The call ended with a successful transfer to another representative.

The user, Cort, called on behalf of Morgan Bennett to schedule a service appointment for a cooling unit that is blowing warm air and not cooling. The agent collected necessary details including service address, preferred appointment time, and warranty information, and informed the user that someone from Budget Heating, Cooling & Plumbing would follow up. The user declined information about maintenance programs and provided neutral feedback, expressing a preference for speaking with a real person.

Deborah called to confirm a service appointment for her heating system making noise, possibly related to the thermostat. The agent booked her a provisional appointment for April 3rd at 10:00 AM and confirmed her contact details. Deborah provided positive feedback about the agent's personality and understanding.
The user requested to speak with a live agent, and the call was successfully transferred to another agent. The initial agent facilitated the transfer promptly without any issues.
The user requested to speak with a live agent, and the agent promptly transferred the call to another representative. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.

The user called to inquire about heating and cooling services and mentioned a billing issue with a previous service. The agent acknowledged the issue and transferred the call to the billing team for further assistance.

Delores called to schedule a drain line installation replacement and was provisionally booked for April 14th in the morning. The agent confirmed the details and the user was satisfied with the service, providing positive feedback. The call ended successfully with no issues.

The user inquired about the Budget Club maintenance program for twice-yearly furnace and air conditioner cleaning. They scheduled a spring cleaning service for the outside HVAC unit on Monday morning, April 6th, and the agent provisionally booked the appointment, informing the user about the dispatch fee and follow-up confirmation. The user declined to provide feedback and ended the call.

Arthur Word called to confirm details about his semiannual HVAC checkup scheduled for 12 o'clock tomorrow and requested a call about pricing and club membership benefits before the visit. The agent confirmed the appointment details and passed the request to the team. The booking attempt failed due to an existing appointment or availability issue.

Sandra called to set up a new appointment for an air conditioner checkup through American Home Shield at her home in Overland. The agent confirmed details including the dispatch number and scheduled an afternoon appointment. Sandra was satisfied with the service and provided positive feedback.

Arthur called to schedule a semiannual HVAC checkup and inspection of a recently installed whole house humidifier. The agent booked an appointment for Thursday at 12:00 p.m. and informed Arthur that the team would confirm the exact time and discuss the dispatch fee. Arthur expressed some concern about not knowing the cost but was satisfied with securing the appointment.
